# Hypo3D

**Summary**: An algorithm to jointly invert recorded waveform arrivals from surface and downhole sensors.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-own|Own, 2015]] used Hypo3D to relocate microseismic events using a shrinking grid technique.

## Key Results and Findings

- The shrinking grids technique in Hypo3D provides accurate hypocenter location when integrated with diverse sensor data. ([[2015-own|Own, 2015, p. 64]])
